channel.title: AI Coding Agents on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in AI Coding Agents on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Agent kit for Azure Cosmos DB
item.description:
Azure Cosmos DB Agent Kit is now generally available. It adds Cosmos DB best practices to AI coding workflows for building database applications.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Manage agent skills with GitHub CLI
item.description:
GitHub CLI now includes gh skill, a new command for discovering and installing agent skills. The post says it is intended to make managing skills easier for AI coding agents.

  • Source: GitHub
